message:
fix(http2): detect SETTINGS_INITIAL_WINDOW_SIZE delta overflow (bd-2c9t)

Per RFC 7540 §6.9.2, if a SETTINGS_INITIAL_WINDOW_SIZE change would
cause an existing stream's send window to exceed 2^31-1, treat as
FLOW_CONTROL_ERROR. Previously used saturating_add which silently
clamped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
